title: Alternate End
description: A mod that reworks the way you adquire ender eyes
body:
This mod seeks to rework how you arrive to the end, inestead of going to the end by crafting up ender eyes, these must now be adquired via defeating bosses.

**Note: If when updating this mod you start crashing, try to delete the configuration file. Config file changes can cause crashes if your older file is outdataded!**

**This mod does NOT add any bosses by itself. Its heavily recommended that you install other mods to go along with it to add bosses and register them on the config!
**
Also check this mod out on [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/alternate-end)

# **Features**

- This mod will disable the traditional recipe to craft ender eyes
- Bosses will now drop ender eyes upon death

Note: Although this mod adds the ability for bosses to drop ender eyes it does NOT add any bosses by itself, meaning this mod is designed to be installed in a modpack with several bosses

# **Configuration Guide**

Upon launching the game with this mod installed, a file will be created in .minecraft > config called "AlternateEndConfig" which should contain the following


```

[Bosses]
	Bosses = "minecraft:enderdragon, minecraft:wither"
	"Boss Display Name" = "Example, Example"

```


in order to configure which entities are considered "bosses" by the mod you must use either one of these options.


```
	Bosses = "minecraft:enderdragon, minecraft:wither"

```

in this field, you may type the bosses registry name. If you do not know the registry name of the boss you can check it in game via the /summon command.


```
"Boss Display Name" = "Example, Example"

```

In this field, you can type the display name of the boss. **this option is not recommended for usage** as it can cause bugs, but was left in for mods that utilize display names over normal entities to determine which of these are bosses.

# **Special Thanks / Credits / Disclaimers**

This mod was made using [MCreator](https://mcreator.net/), special thanks to the MCreator team for making this all possible.


This is one of my first mods ever done, originally created for a modpack in between me and a friend alongside a few others which i decided to share for the first time. If there are any bugs found contact me and ill attempt to fix them if possible!


If you want to support me, you may donate to my [Buy me a coffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/magythemage) page, any kind of support is welcome but not necesary.
